summary: BUILDER addressed all 6 HIGH-priority and 4 of 6 MEDIUM-priority suggestions, with documented rejections for the rest. Network is biologically much stronger: GA now flows GA⊣DELLA→ANT→Integument_Growth (proper Perception Gate), HAIKU pathway complete (SHB1→MINI3→IKU1/IKU2 fan-out), GRF–GIF1 hub reconnected, BR signalling re-routed via BZR1 to preserve gate purity, and AGG3 wires directly to phenotype. Mean rubric rose from 3.18 to 4.05. Remaining concerns are mostly literature_gaps (WRI1 has no curated path, TTG2 upstream regulators absent from curated_edges) plus one MEDIUM (GIF1 still at 0.25 coverage with E149 deferred to honour phenotype-activator cap). Verdict iterate at MEDIUM intensity — a third pass to address GIF1 fan-out and the LEC2↔FUS3 maturation switch is warranted before approval.

rejected_with_documented_reason.reason: No curated path to phenotype — would create floating sink. Literature gap filed. Defensible.
Phenotype 5-activator hard cap. Defensible but means GIF1 coverage stays at 0.25; consider trimming a less-impactful phenotype activator instead.
Integument_Growth at 15 inputs already over the 7-cap. Defensible — process aggregator exception.
Direction reversal orphaned AGB1 (no outgoing path). Reverted to network direction AGB1→AGG3 with E133 evidence and Trap-1 rationale. Defensible.
LOW priority deferred for positive-feedback risk and minor benefit. Defensible.

newly_introduced_issues: Endosperm_Proliferation in-degree rose to 9 (was 8) after BZR1 add — above 7-cap but acceptable for major aggregator process
BZR1 fan-out rose to 9 outputs (was 6) after S009 — out-degree not capped per BUILDER §10, but flag for review of signal dilution

pathway_completeness.justification: GA pathway now has proper Perception Gate via DELLA. HAIKU pathway complete with SHB1→IKU2 and MINI3→IKU2 added. GRF–GIF1 cell-proliferation arm reconnected. Sugar/T6P/TOR/SnRK1 still entirely absent (literature_gap). WRI1 / seed-oil arc still absent (literature_gap). Score rises from 3 to 4.

mechanistic_depth.justification: GA cascade now has proper depth: GA⊣DELLA→ANT→Integument_Growth→Seed_Size. BR cascade preserves depth: BR→BRI1⊣BIN2⊣BZR1→{multiple targets including new Endosperm_Proliferation, PRC2}. Auxin→TIR1→ARF2 cascade intact. LAFL→maturation→ABI cascade well-layered. No major cascade reduces to a flat shortcut. Score rises from 4 to 5.

motif_coverage.justification: Perception Gate now applied for both GA (clean: GA→DELLA only outgoing) and BR (clean: BR→BRI1 only outgoing). Auxin still has 4 outgoing edges (TIR1, Integument_Growth, Endosperm_Proliferation, PRC2) — Perception Gate partially violated but the bypass edges have direct curated mechanism. Multi-Output Scaffold properly applied (BZR1 has 9 targets, MAX2-equivalent role). Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance present for ABA, CK, GA. Coherent Feed-Forward present for ABI cascade and BR→{multiple substrates}. Score rises from 3 to 5.

cascade_balance.justification: Source % dropped from 45.6% to 42.5% — well within softened 30–50% target. Most non-source nodes have 1–6 inputs. Notable hubs over the 7-cap: Integument_Growth (15 in), Endosperm_Proliferation (9 in), Seed_Size (7 in), PRC2 (6 in). These are major aggregator processes / phenotype — acceptable per BUILDER §15. Single-input nodes (e.g., ABI4 with only ABI3) are sparse but defensible. Score rises from 3 to 4.

composite_node_handling.justification: DELLA correctly added as PROTEIN_COMPLEX composite (collapses GAI/RGA/RGL1/RGL2/RGL3). PRC2 composite intact. Other paralog families remain split where biology supports it (CKX2/3/5 different domains, GA20OX/3OX/2OX different reactions, VAL1/VAL2 separate). Score unchanged at 4.

hub_completeness.justification: Integument_Growth added 2 of 4 missing HIGH-conf inputs (ANT, SEEDSTICK), with E170/E074 deferred for documented hub-overload reason. Endosperm_Proliferation added BZR1 input (captures E101 effect). Seed_Size added AGG3 (+) and ABI5 (-). GIF1→Seed_Size (E149) deferred for phenotype activator cap — weakest remaining gap. Score rises from 3 to 4.

topology_hazards.justification: GA Perception Gate now clean (single outgoing edge from Gibberellin to DELLA). BR Perception Gate intact (single outgoing edge from Brassinosteroid to BRI1). AGB1↔AGG3 mutual feedback avoided by retaining single direction with documented rationale. No new positive feedback loops introduced. Auxin still has 4 outgoing edges (partial Perception Gate violation but each is independently curated). DA1/DA2/EOD1 negative-feedback loops stable. Score unchanged at 4.

evidence_quality.justification: All 13 newly-added edges have specific mechanism strings citing curated DOIs (Gomez 2023 for DELLA module, Zhou 2009 for SHB1→IKU2, Luo 2005 for MINI3→IKU2, Mizzotti 2021 for SEEDSTICK, Cheng 2014 for ABI5, Kim 2019 for GRF-GIF, Liu 2020 for GIF1, Pankaj 2024 for BR→endosperm/PRC2, Figueiredo 2016 for Auxin⊣PRC2, Li 2012 for AGG3, Gomez 2023 for ANT→Integument_Growth). Authors and years populated. Score unchanged at 4.

phenotype_audit.justification: Seed_Size now has 5 activators (Integument_Growth, Endosperm_Proliferation, Ovule_size, Storage_reserves, AGG3) and 2 inhibitors (ABA, ABI5) — at the 5-activator hard cap, with both arms balanced. All major effector classes covered: maternal, filial, ovule, reserves, hormone (ABA), G-protein, ABA-effector TF (ABI5). GIF1 effect captured indirectly via Integument_Growth. Score rises from 3 to 4.

rejected_edges_review.justification: Of the 16 HIGH-conf inter-network rejections flagged in iter 1, BUILDER applied 11 and provided documented rejection reasons for 5 (E074, E101, E102 (routed differently), E106 (intentionally removed for Perception Gate), E120 (positive feedback), E133 (orphan risk), E149 (cap), E170 (hub overload), E212 (positive self-loop)). Each rejection has a defensible biological/structural reason in build_log_iteration_2.json. Score rises from 2 to 4.

key_player_density.justification: Substantial improvement: ANT 0.17→0.50, SEEDSTICK 0.38→0.50, GIF1 0.12→0.25, DELLA 0.00→0.40, IKU2/SHB1/MINI3 all 1.00. Remaining under-0.30 candidates: WRI1 (0.00, literature_gap — no curated path), TTG2 (0.20, literature_gap — only excluded edges target non-network nodes), GIF1 (0.25 — BUILDER-rejectable: E149 deferred for activator cap rather than literature_gap). Per Anti-Pattern 6, GIF1 has a documented exclusion rationale (phenotype-activator cap) but the rationale could be revisited by trimming a less-critical phenotype activator. Score rises from 2 to 3.

per_node_audit_delta_only.comment: Newly added. 1 inhibitor (Gibberellin), 1 outgoing (→ANT). Composite represents GAI/RGA/RGL family. Reaches phenotype via DELLA→ANT→Integument_Growth→Seed_Size.
Now has 1 input (GRF) and 1 output (Integument_Growth). Coverage 0.25 — still flagged. Could improve by adding GIF1→Seed_Size (E149) IF a phenotype activator is trimmed.
Now has 1 input (DELLA) and 2 outputs (Ovule_size, Integument_Growth). Coverage rose to 0.50. Properly integrated.
Now has 2 inputs and 2 outputs (E2FA, Integument_Growth). Coverage rose to 0.50.
Now has 5 activators (BZR1, IKU1, SHB1, MINI3) and 1 inhibitor (RAV1). HAIKU pathway canonical fan-out.
Single outgoing edge to DELLA. Bio/degradation balance preserved.
Single outgoing edge to BRI1. Effects E101/E102 routed via BZR1 instead of direct.
9 outputs (was 6). Fan-out high but biologically justified — BES1/BZR1 has hundreds of in vivo targets.
Now 9 inputs (added BZR1). Above 7-cap but acceptable for major aggregator process.
Now 16 inputs (was 14, +ANT, +SEEDSTICK, -GA direct). Above 7-cap; documented exception.
5 activators + 2 inhibitors. At hard cap. Both arms balanced.
Now has 4 activators (subunits) + 2 inhibitors (Auxin, BZR1). Hormone integration captured.
Still has 0 inputs, 1 output (→AGG3). is_source=true. E133 curated direction reverted to keep AGB1 reachable.

per_pathway_audit_delta_only.comment: DELLA inserted, GA single-outgoing-edge gate established. Cascade: GA⊣DELLA→ANT→Integument_Growth→Seed_Size. Major fix.
GRF→GIF1 added; chain miR396⊣GRF→GIF1→Integument_Growth now wired. Direct GIF1→Seed_Size still missing (would push phenotype above activator cap).
SHB1→IKU2 and MINI3→IKU2 added. Canonical fan-out complete.
Both TFs now wire to Integument_Growth. ANT also receives DELLA input.
Perception Gate preserved by routing E101/E102 effects via BZR1 rather than direct hormone edges. PRC2 now under BR control as intended.
Auxin⊣PRC2 added. PRC2 hormone-integration arm complete.
WRI1 cannot be added without a curated downstream edge to a phenotype-reachable node. Literature_gap stands.

suggestions.description: Reconsider GIF1→Seed_Size by trimming a less-impactful phenotype activator (e.g., Storage_reserves only routes from FUS3+ABI3 with no direct WT-affecting perturbations)
suggestions.biological_justification: GIF1 coverage is 0.25 because direct phenotype edge E149 was deferred to honour the phenotype 5-activator cap. However, Storage_reserves currently aggregates only FUS3 and ABI3 (both already feed ABI3 and other phenotype effects), so its independent contribution may be redundant. Trimming Storage_reserves would free a slot for GIF1→Seed_Size, giving the GRF–GIF1 hub direct phenotype impact.
suggestions.implementation: Option A: Drop Storage_reserves→Seed_Size (kept as side-aggregator without phenotype edge), add GIF1→Seed_Size (+1, E149). Phenotype activators: Integument_Growth, Endosperm_Proliferation, Ovule_size, AGG3, GIF1 = 5. Option B: Defer to refinement and accept 0.25 coverage. BUILDER's call.

suggestions.description: Reconsider LEC2→FUS3 (E120) to capture canonical maturation TF mutual activation
suggestions.biological_justification: LEC1/LEC2/FUS3 mutual activation is the textbook architecture of the LAFL maturation network. Currently FUS3→LEC2 is in network but LEC2→FUS3 is rejected for positive-feedback risk. Damping=0.7 should stabilise the loop, and the absence of mutual activation means LEC2 single KO cannot fully model the LEC2-driven FUS3 reduction observed in mutants.
suggestions.implementation: Add LEC2→FUS3 (+1). Monitor in next BUILDER pass for runaway amplification on LEC2 OE perturbation; if present, accept as known limitation and document in mechanism.

suggestions.description: Connect WRI1 to phenotype — needs at least one curated WRI1→in-network-target edge
suggestions.biological_justification: WRI1 has 6 curated edges (3 incoming from LAFL TFs, 1 to Seed_oil_content, 2 to other non-network targets). Adding WRI1 would create a 3-input sink unless its downstream is curated. Step 1 LITERATURE REVIEW should search for 'WRI1 ABI3 transcriptional', 'WRI1 storage protein', 'WRI1 LEC1 seed maturation downstream' and add a curated edge from WRI1 to Storage_reserves, ABI3, or another in-network maturation node.
suggestions.implementation: Step 1 backlog. Once one WRI1→in-network edge is curated, BUILDER can add WRI1 as a node with 3 LAFL inputs and reach the phenotype.

suggestions.description: TTG2 upstream regulators (TOP1α, UPF1) and downstream targets (Tannin_synthesis, Seed_coat_structure) not in curated_edges as in-network candidates
suggestions.biological_justification: TTG2 coverage stays at 0.20 because all 4 excluded curated edges target/source non-network nodes. Adding TOP1α and UPF1 as upstream regulators would give TTG2 a regulated context rather than appearing as a constitutive source.
suggestions.implementation: Step 1 backlog. Acceptable as literature_gap — not actionable by BUILDER without new curated edges.

suggestions.description: Consider E212 ABI4 self-loop — reconsidered now that ABA cascade is more layered
suggestions.biological_justification: ABI4 self-positive amplification is curated (Reeves 2011) but rejected in iter 1 for stability concern. Now that the ABA cascade has more inputs and feedback (ABA→ABI5⊣SHB1, ABI5⊣Seed_Size), the ABI4 self-loop is one of several stabilising inputs and may be safe with damping. Optional.
suggestions.implementation: Optional: add ABI4→ABI4 (+1). Verify baseline simulation does not destabilise ABI cascade.

literature_gaps: TTG2 upstream regulators (TOP1α, UPF1) need curation
TPS1 / T6P / TOR / SnRK1 sugar-energy axis still missing
GID1A/GID1B GA receptors not in curated_edges as candidate nodes
RGL2 (specific DELLA member) referenced in E131 but not curated as separate node
ABCG17/18 ABA transporters referenced but not curated
